creator: peter@vereshagin.org
text:
God love is hard to find. You got lucky, Renato!

Nothing was changed by myself. Right now i only have done make clean all deinstall reinstall and it was ok.
I did rebuilt several other ports though and this perhaps influenced.
Have no idea about what in particular.

2008/07/23 16:08:38 -0300 Renato Botelho <garga@FreeBSD.org> => To peter@vereshagin.org :

RB> This seems to be a local problem. Wmakerconf just include varargs.h if the
RB> configure script detects it's necessary.
RB> 
RB> Could you send me more information and i can help you to track what's the
RB> problem, the information i need is:
RB> 
RB> - Is your ports tree up-to-date?
RB> - Result of `pkg_info` command
RB> - Execute this:
RB>   # cd /usr/ports/x11-wm/wmakerconf
RB>   # make clean
RB>   # make configure
RB> 
RB>   After send me ./work/wmakerconf-2.12/config.log and config.h

73! Peter
-- 
http://vereshagin.org
